/* 
This folder is for offline dependencies. To enable full offline mapping:
1) Place sql.js build files here:
   /vendor/sql.js/sql-wasm.js
   /vendor/sql.js/sql-wasm.wasm
   See: https://github.com/sql-js/sql.js

2) Place Leaflet MBTiles plugin build here (ESM):
   /vendor/leaflet-tilelayer-mbtiles-ts/index.js
   See: https://github.com/0nza1101/leaflet-tilelayer-mbtiles-ts

3) Optionally vendor Leaflet JS/CSS into /vendor/leaflet/ and update import map in index.html.
*/
